name_en: P YSL latest new color-blocked style, light color is linen, top-grain cowhide. Simple V lines outline the whole bag, making it look more three-dimensional. YSL's envelope design mini bag is undoubtedly the king of production. The top design features an auto-rebound activity lock. Size 22*6*16, Code 532750
